stemHtml: An aeroplane extends its flaps asymmetrically. The aircraft will roll towards the side with...

options.a: LEAST flaps extended and have a yawing moment to the same side.
options.b: HIGHEST flaps extended and have a yawing moment to the same side.
options.c: HIGHEST flaps extended and have a yawing moment to the opposite side.
options.d: LEAST flaps extended and have a yawing moment to the opposite side.
